headline: Baron Real Estate Income Fund Sold Its Position in Iron Mountain Incorporated (IRM)
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 letter for its “Baron Real Estate Income Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In 2025, the Fund appreciated 3.74% (Institutional Shares), exceeding the 1.68% gain for the MSCI US REIT Index (the REIT Index). In Q4 2025, the Fund declined modestly by […]
